info.name: KOS Management API - Full Collection
info.description:
Complete API Collection for KOS Management System with Gateway

## Architecture
```
[Client] -> [Gateway :3000]
             /service1 -> [Auth Service :3001]
             /service2 -> [User Service PHP :3002]
             /service3 -> [Kos Service :3003]
```

## Base URL
Configure `{{base_url}}` in your environment (e.g., http://localhost:3000)

## Default Test Data (After Seeding)
| Role | Email | Password | Balance |
|------|-------|----------|---------|
| Superadmin | superadmin@example.com | password123 | Rp 100,000,000 |
| Pemilik | pemilik@test.com | password123 | Rp 50,000,000 |
| User (Penyewa) | testuser@example.com | password123 | Rp 50,000,000 |

**Kos Available:**
- Kos Melati (Jakarta Selatan, MIX)
- Kos Mawar (Jakarta Barat, WANITA)
- Kos Sejuk (Jakarta Timur, PRIA)

**Rooms:** 13 rooms with prices Rp 400,000 - Rp 900,000

item.name: Register User (Penyewa)
item.description:
Mendaftarkan user baru dengan role Penyewa menggunakan email/password.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/register-user

**Body:**
```json
{
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "username": "johndoe",
    "fullName": "John Doe",
    "phone": "081234567890"
}
```

item.name: Register Pemilik (Owner)
item.description:
Mendaftarkan user baru dengan role Pemilik menggunakan email/password.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/register-pemilik

**Body:**
```json
{
    "email": "owner@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "username": "owner1",
    "fullName": "Owner Satu",
    "phone": "081234567891"
}
```

item.name: Login - Email/Password
item.description:
Login dengan email dan password. Returns access_token dan refresh_token.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/login

**Body:**
```json
{
    "email": "superadmin@example.com",
    "password": "password123"
}
```

**Test Data:**
- Superadmin: superadmin@example.com / password123
- Pemilik: pemilik@test.com / password123
- User: testuser@example.com / password123

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description:
Gunakan refresh_token untuk mendapatkan access_token baru.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/refresh

**Body:**
```json
{
    "refresh_token": "{{refresh_token}}"
}
```

item.name: Logout All Devices
item.description:
Logout dari semua device.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/logout-all

**Auth:** Required (Bearer token)

item.name: Get Current User (Me)
item.description:
Mendapatkan informasi user yang sedang login.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/me

**Auth:** Required

item.name: 1.2 Authentication - Google OAuth
item.description: Login dan Register menggunakan Google OAuth

item.name: Google OAuth - Login User (Penyewa)
item.description:
Mendapatkan URL untuk login Google sebagai User/Penyewa.
Buka URL hasil di browser, lalu akan di-redirect ke callback dengan token.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/google/user

**Catatan:** Response akan berupa redirect ke Google. Dari browser akan diarahkan ke callback dengan token di URL.

item.name: Google OAuth - Login Pemilik
item.description:
Mendapatkan URL untuk login Google sebagai Pemilik.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/google/pemilik

item.name: Google OAuth - Register User (Penyewa)
item.description:
Register user baru via Google OAuth.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/register-user/oauth/google

**Body:**
```json
{
    "idToken": "[Google ID Token]"
}
```

**Catatan:** Gunakan Google ID Token dari Google Sign-In.

item.name: Google OAuth - Register Pemilik
item.description:
Register pemilik baru via Google OAuth.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/register-pemilik/oauth/google

**Body:**
```json
{
    "idToken": "[Google ID Token]"
}
```

item.name: OAuth Callback - User (Penyewa)
item.description:
Callback URL untuk Google OAuth User. Tidak perlu dipanggil manual - otomatis dari redirect Google.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/callback/user

item.name: OAuth Callback - Pemilik
item.description:
Callback URL untuk Google OAuth Pemilik.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/callback/pemilik

item.name: Get All Profile Users
item.description:
Mengambil semua data profile user dengan pagination.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service2/api/profile

**Query Parameters:**
- `page`: Nomor halaman
- `limit`: Jumlah data per halaman

**Auth:** Required

item.name: Create Profile User
item.description:
Membuat data profile user baru.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service2/api/profile

**Mode 1: Create with Auth (creates both auth + profile)**
**Required Fields:**
- `username`: Username untuk login
- `email`: Email untuk login
- `password`: Password untuk login
- `firstname`: Nama depan
- `lastname`: Nama belakang

**Optional Fields:**
- `phone`: Nomor telepon
- `pictures`: URL gambar/avatar

**Mode 2: Link to Existing Auth**
**Required Fields:**
- `authId`: ID dari tabel auth (existing)
- `firstname`: Nama depan
- `lastname`: Nama belakang

**Optional Fields:**
- `phone`: Nomor telepon
- `pictures`: URL gambar/avatar

**Body (Mode 1 - Create with Auth):**
```json
{
    "username": "johndoe",
    "email": "johndoe@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "firstname": "John",
    "lastname": "Doe",
    "phone": "081234567890",
    "pictures": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg"
}
```

**Body (Mode 2 - Link to existing Auth):**
```json
{
    "authId": 5,
    "firstname": "John",
    "lastname": "Doe",
    "phone": "081234567890",
    "pictures": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg"
}
```

item.name: Get Profile User by ID
item.description:
Mengambil detail profile user berdasarkan ID.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service2/api/profile/{id}

item.name: Update Profile User
item.description:
Mengupdate data profile user.

**Endpoint:** PUT {{base_url}}/service2/api/profile/{id}

**Fields yang bisa diupdate:**
- `firstname`: Nama depan
- `lastname`: Nama belakang
- `phone`: Nomor telepon
- `pictures`: URL gambar/avatar

**Body:**
```json
{
    "firstname": "John Updated",
    "lastname": "Doe Updated",
    "phone": "081298765432",
    "pictures": "https://example.com/new-avatar.jpg"
}
```

item.name: Get All Owner Profiles
item.description:
Mengambil semua data owner profile dengan pagination.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service2/api/ownerprofile

**Auth:** Required (Superadmin)

item.name: Create Owner Profile
item.description:
Membuat data owner profile baru.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service2/api/ownerprofile

**Mode 1: Create with Auth (creates both auth + owner profile)**
Default roleId: 2 (Pemilik)

**Required Fields:**
- `username`: Username untuk login
- `email`: Email untuk login
- `password`: Password untuk login
- `firstname`: Nama depan
- `lastname`: Nama belakang

**Optional Fields:**
- `phone`: Nomor telepon
- `pictures`: URL gambar/avatar

**Mode 2: Link to Existing Auth**
**Required Fields:**
- `authId`: ID dari tabel auth (existing)
- `firstname`: Nama depan
- `lastname`: Nama belakang

**Optional Fields:**
- `phone`: Nomor telepon
- `pictures`: URL gambar/avatar

**Body (Mode 1 - Create with Auth):**
```json
{
    "username": "pemilik1",
    "email": "pemilik@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "firstname": "Pemilik",
    "lastname": "Kos",
    "phone": "081298765432",
    "pictures": "https://example.com/owner.jpg"
}
```

**Body (Mode 2 - Link to existing Auth):**
```json
{
    "authId": 5,
    "firstname": "Pemilik",
    "lastname": "Kos",
    "phone": "081298765432",
    "pictures": "https://example.com/owner.jpg"
}
```

item.name: Get Owner Profile by ID
item.description:
Mengambil detail owner profile berdasarkan ID.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service2/api/ownerprofile/{id}

item.name: Update Owner Profile
item.description:
Mengupdate data owner profile.

**Endpoint:** PUT {{base_url}}/service2/api/ownerprofile/{id}

**Fields yang bisa diupdate:**
- `firstname`: Nama depan
- `lastname`: Nama belakang
- `phone`: Nomor telepon
- `pictures`: URL gambar/avatar

**Body:**
```json
{
    "firstname": "Pemilik Updated",
    "lastname": "Kos Updated",
    "phone": "081111111111"
}
```

item.name: Get All Roles
item.description:
Mengambil semua data role dengan pagination.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service2/api/role

**Auth:** Required

item.name: Create Role
item.description:
Membuat role baru.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service2/api/role

**Required Fields:**
- `name`: Nama role (required)
- `description`: Deskripsi role (required)

**Body:**
```json
{
    "name": "Manager",
    "description": "Manager Tingkat Tinggi"
}
```

item.name: Get Role by ID
item.description:
Mengambil detail role berdasarkan ID.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service2/api/role/{id}

item.name: Update Role
item.description:
Mengupdate data role.

**Endpoint:** PUT {{base_url}}/service2/api/role/{id}

**Fields yang bisa diupdate:**
- `name`: Nama role
- `description`: Deskripsi role

**Body:**
```json
{
    "name": "Superadmin Updated",
    "description": "Super Administrator - Updated"
}
```

item.name: Get All KOS (Public)
item.description: Mengambil semua data KOS. Tidak memerlukan authentication.

item.name: Get My KOS (Pemilik)
item.description:
Mengambil daftar KOS yang dimiliki user login.

**Auth:** Required (Pemilik/Superadmin)

item.name: Create KOS
item.description:
Membuat KOS baru.

**Auth:** Required (Pemilik)

**Required Fields:**
- `name`: Nama KOS (required)
- `alamat`: Alamat KOS (required)

**Optional Fields:**
- `description`: Deskripsi KOS
- `fasilitas`: Array fasilitas (contoh: ["AC", "WiFi"])
- `gender`: Tipe penghuni (PRIA, WANITA, MIX)

**Body:**
```json
{
    "name": "KOS Mewah Jakarta",
    "alamat": "Jl Sudirman No 100 Jakarta Pusat",
    "description": "KOS premium dengan fasilitas lengkap",
    "fasilitas": ["AC", "WiFi", "Kamar Mandi Dalam", "Laundry"],
    "gender": "PRIA"
}
```

body.raw:
{
    "name": "KOS Mewah Jakarta",
    "alamat": "Jl Sudirman No 100 Jakarta Pusat",
    "description": "KOS premium dengan fasilitas lengkap",
    "fasilitas": ["AC", "WiFi", "Kamar Mandi Dalam", "Laundry"],
    "gender": "PRIA"
}

item.name: Create Room
item.description:
Membuat room baru.

**Auth:** Required (Pemilik)

**Required Fields:**
- `kosId`: ID KOS (required)
- `name`: Nama room (required)
- `price`: Harga per bulan (required)
- `status`: Status (AVAILABLE, OCCUPIED, MAINTENANCE)

**Optional Fields:**
- `description`: Deskripsi room
- `kapasitas`: Kapasitas maksimal penghuni (default: 1)

**Body:**
```json
{
    "kosId": 3,
    "name": "Room 101",
    "description": "Kamar Deluxe dengan AC",
    "price": 150000,
    "status": "AVAILABLE",
    "kapasitas": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Facilities (Public)
item.description:
Mengambil semua facility dengan pagination.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service3/facility

**Query Parameters:**
- `page`: Nomor halaman
- `limit`: Jumlah data per halaman
- `search`: Pencarian berdasarkan nama

item.name: Create Facility (Superadmin)
item.description:
Membuat facility baru.

**Auth:** Required (Superadmin)

**Body:**
```json
{
    "name": "Wifi",
    "desc": "Internet kecepatan tinggi"
}
```

item.name: Get Facilities by KOS ID (Public)
item.description:
Mengambil fasilitas berdasarkan KOS ID.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service3/facility/kos/{kosId}

item.name: Add Facility to KOS (Pemilik)
item.description:
Menambahkan facility ke kos.

**Auth:** Required (Pemilik)

**Single Facility:**
```json
{
    "kosId": 1,
    "facilityId": 1
}
```

**Multiple Facilities:**
```json
{
    "kosId": 1,
    "facilityIds": [1, 2, 3]
}
```

item.name: Get Receipts by User ID
item.description:
Mengambil receipt by user ID.

**Auth:** Required (Superadmin)

item.name: Step 1: Login as Superadmin
item.description:
Login sebagai superadmin untuk mendapatkan token.

**Test Data:** superadmin@example.com / password123

**Token akan otomatis tersimpan** ke variabel environment setelah login.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "KOS Admin Demo",
    "alamat": "Jl Demo No 1 Jakarta",
    "description": "KOS untuk demo admin",
    "fasilitas": ["AC", "WiFi"],
    "gender": "MIX"
}

item.name: Step 1: Login as User
item.description:
Login sebagai penyewa/user biasa.

**Test Data:** testuser@example.com / password123

**Token akan otomatis tersimpan** ke variabel environment setelah login.

item.name: Step 1: Get Google OAuth URL (User)
item.description:
Dapatkan URL untuk login Google sebagai User/Penyewa.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/google/user

**Cara:** Buka URL hasil di browser, login dengan Google, lalu akan di-redirect ke callback dengan token di URL.

item.name: Step 2: OAuth Callback - User
item.description:
Callback akan otomatis redirect ke application dengan token.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/callback/user

**Catatan:** Otomatis diproses oleh browser setelah login Google.

item.name: Step 1: Get Google OAuth URL (Pemilik)
item.description:
Dapatkan URL untuk login Google sebagai Pemilik.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/google/pemilik

item.name: Step 2: OAuth Callback - Pemilik
item.description:
Callback akan otomatis redirect ke application dengan token.

**Endpoint:** GET {{base_url}}/service1/callback/pemilik

item.name: OAuth - Register with ID Token
item.description: Register baru menggunakan Google ID Token

item.name: Register User via Google OAuth (ID Token)
item.description:
Register user baru dengan Google ID Token.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/register-user/oauth/google

**Body:**
```json
{
    "idToken": "[Google ID Token dari Google Sign-In]"
}
```

**Cara:** Gunakan Google Sign-In di frontend untuk mendapatkan ID Token, lalu kirim ke endpoint ini.

item.name: Register Pemilik via Google OAuth (ID Token)
item.description:
Register pemilik baru dengan Google ID Token.

**Endpoint:** POST {{base_url}}/service1/register-pemilik/oauth/google

**Body:**
```json
{
    "idToken": "[Google ID Token]"
}
```
